channel.title: GitHub Swift Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: github/CopilotForXcode
item.description: Xcode extension for GitHub Copilot

item.title: stripe/stripe-ios
item.description: Stripe iOS SDK

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-snapshot-testing
item.description: 📸 Delightful Swift snapshot testing.

item.title: peripheryapp/periphery
item.description: A tool to identify unused code in Swift projects.

item.title: onevcat/Kingfisher
item.description: A lightweight, pure-Swift library for downloading and caching images from the web.

item.title: Moya/Moya
item.description: Network abstraction layer written in Swift.

item.title: nicklockwood/SwiftFormat
item.description: A command-line tool and Xcode Extension for formatting Swift code

item.title: ChartsOrg/Charts
item.description: Beautiful charts for iOS/tvOS/OSX! The Apple side of the crossplatform MPAndroidChart.

item.title: realm/SwiftLint
item.description: A tool to enforce Swift style and conventions.

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-composable-architecture
item.description: A library for building applications in a consistent and understandable way, with composition, testing, and ergonomics in mind.

item.title: intitni/CopilotForXcode
item.description: The first GitHub Copilot, Codeium and ChatGPT Xcode Source Editor Extension

item.title: coteditor/CotEditor
item.description: Lightweight Plain-Text Editor for macOS

item.title: whoeevee/EeveeSpotify
item.description: A tweak to get Spotify Premium for free, just like Spotilife

item.title: SwiftyJSON/SwiftyJSON
item.description: The better way to deal with JSON data in Swift.

item.title: ReactiveX/RxSwift
item.description: Reactive Programming in Swift

item.title: facebook/facebook-ios-sdk
item.description: Used to integrate the Facebook Platform with your iOS & tvOS apps.

item.title: airbnb/lottie-ios
item.description: An iOS library to natively render After Effects vector animations

item.title: siteline/swiftui-introspect
item.description: Introspect underlying UIKit/AppKit components from SwiftUI

item.title: Alamofire/Alamofire
item.description: Elegant HTTP Networking in Swift

item.title: hackiftekhar/IQKeyboardManager
item.description: Codeless drop-in universal library allows to prevent issues of keyboard sliding up and cover UITextField/UITextView. Neither need to write any code nor any setup required and much more.

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-dependencies
item.description: A dependency management library inspired by SwiftUI's "environment."

item.title: yonaskolb/XcodeGen
item.description: A Swift command line tool for generating your Xcode project

item.title: swiftlang/swift-syntax
item.description: A set of Swift libraries for parsing, inspecting, generating, and transforming Swift source code.

item.title: SnapKit/SnapKit
item.description: A Swift Autolayout DSL for iOS & OS X
